positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, ornamental illustration featuring stylized cosmic botanicals. The scene composition is central and balanced, filled with interwoven elements like delicate nebula swirls, crescent moons, and exaggerated, geometric celestial foliage. The style should mimic sophisticated vector art and modern etching, utilizing a restricted color palette of deep indigo, matte gold, and cream white. Emphasis must be placed on strong, clean silhouettes and high-contrast line work suitable for screen printing on apparel. The overall feeling is ethereal and majestic, designed to work as a seamless, repeating pattern or a striking single centerpiece graphic. Minimalist, clean lines, zentangle inspired, symmetrical composition.
